content.problemStatement:
You are given NNN binary strings of length NNN each. You need to find a binary string of length NNN which is different from all of the given strings.

Note:


A binary string is defined as a string consisting only of `'0'` and `'1'`.
A string is considered different from another string when they have different lengths, or when they differ in at least one position.

Input Format


The first line will contain TTT - the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.




The first line of each test case contains NNN  - the number of strings and length of strings.




Each of the next NNN lines contains a binary string of length NNN.





Output Format
For each test case, print on one line a binary string of length NNN, which is different from all of the given strings. If there are multiple possible answers, print any.
